# feed — ARCHITECTURE.md
# Last Updated: 2026-06-02
# Status: CURRENT SOURCE OF TRUTH — generated by ARCHITECT 2026-06-02

## Feature Overview

The feed feature is the central content discovery system for the VCSM platform. It renders paginated, privacy-filtered, block-aware, reaction-enriched posts for authenticated citizens via a pipeline/query/DAL stack that executes up to 9 parallel DB reads per page load. Two parallel hook implementations exist: the legacy `useFeed.js` (manual pagination loop) and the newer `useCentralFeed.js` (React Query infinite scroll), both backed by the same `fetchFeedPage.pipeline.js` pipeline. The feature is self-contained with no engine-layer controllers or DALs — it consumes one engine alias (`@hydration`) for actor data enrichment.

**Source Path:** `apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/`
**Engine Path:** None — feature-only (consumes `@hydration` engine alias only)

---

| Layer | Present | Path |

| Controllers | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/controllers/ |

| Models | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/model/ |
| Hooks | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/hooks/ |
| Screens | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/screens/ |
| Components | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/components/ |
| Adapters | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/adapters/ |
| Pipeline | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/pipeline/ (non-standard extra layer) |
| Queries | YES | apps/VCSM/src/features/feed/queries/ (non-standard extra layer) |
| Engine controllers | NO | None |
| Engine DALs | NO | None |

---

## Active Controllers

| Controller | Purpose | Auth Gate |
|---|---|---|
| feedWelcomeCard.controller.js | Read/write welcome card visibility state for a given actorId | None — caller must supply valid actorId; write path depends on DB RLS (V3 HIGH OPEN) |
| getDebugPrivacyRows.controller.js | Dev-only: build privacy debug matrix for a set of post IDs | None — actorId required but dev-panel only; no prod auth gate |
| getFeedViewerContext.controller.js | Determine viewer adult status from actor+profile data | Input guard: returns null if no actorId; silently fails on error |
| listActorPosts.controller.js | SSOT for actor-scoped post reads (used by feed AND profiles) | Input guard: throws on missing actorId/viewerActorId; RLS enforces visibility |

**Superseded / Dead:**
No dead controllers identified. Note: `getDebugPrivacyRows.controller.js` is dev-diagnostic tooling and should never be exposed on a production-facing route.

---

## Active DALs

| DAL | Schema | Tables | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| feed.read.posts.dal.js | vc | posts | Primary cursor-paginated posts read; explicit column select; no select('*') |
| feed.read.actorsBundle.dal.js | vc + vport schema | actors, profiles (vc), actor_privacy_settings, vport.profiles | TTL-cached (30s) per-actor bundle; reduces cross-page round-trips |
| feed.read.blockRows.dal.js | moderation | blocks | TTL-cached (60s); UUID validation via isUuid() guard |
| feed.read.followRows.dal.js | vc | actor_follows | TTL-cached; scoped to viewer+actorIds |
| feed.read.media.dal.js | vc | post_media | Batched per page |
| feed.read.hiddenPosts.dal.js | moderation | actions | Client-supplied viewerActorId; depends on moderation.actions RLS (V1 OPEN) |
| feed.read.commentCounts.dal.js | vc | post_comments | Batched count per page |
| feed.read.viewerReactions.dal.js | vc | post_reactions | Client-supplied actorId; depends on vc.post_reactions RLS (V2 OPEN) |
| feed.read.reactionCounts.dal.js | vc | post_reactions, post_rose_gifts | Parallel reads for like/dislike/rose counts |
| feed.read.viewerContext.dal.js | vc | actors, profiles | Actor + adult flag lookup |
| feed.read.followRows.dal.js | vc | actor_follows | Follow rows scoped to viewer |
| feed.mentions.dal.js | vc | post_mentions | Fetches @mention edges; NOTE: previously also imported @hydration (SA2 HIGH violation — now removed from DAL, hydration moved to pipeline) |
| feed.read.debugPrivacyRows.dal.js | vc | posts, actors, actor_privacy_settings, actor_owners, actor_follows | Dev-only; used by diagnostics |
| feedWelcomeCard.dal.js | vc | actor_onboarding_steps | READ + WRITE (upsert); client-supplied actorId; WITH CHECK RLS unconfirmed (V3 HIGH) |
| listActorPostsByActor.dal.js | vc | posts | Actor-scoped post list; explicit column select |
| feed.posts.dal.js (LEGACY) | vc | posts | Legacy — dev diagnostics only; imports @hydration (layer violation); DO NOT expand |

---

## Active Hooks

| Hook | What It Calls | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| useFeed.js | fetchFeedPagePipeline, hydrateActorsByIds (@hydration), useActorStore, debugFeedEvent | Legacy paginated feed hook; manual cursor loop; primary production hook |
| useCentralFeed.js | fetchCentralFeedPage, hydrateActorsByIds (@hydration), useActorStore, useInfiniteQuery | React Query replacement for useFeed; identical public API; staleTime 30s |
| useCentralFeedActions.js | useDeletePostAction, useFollowActorToggle, useFollowStatus, useBlockActorAction, useHidePostForActor, useReportFlow, shareNative | All post action handlers (delete, follow, block, hide, report, share) for CentralFeedScreen |
| useFeedWelcomeCard.js | ctrlGetWelcomeCardVisible, ctrlMarkWelcomeCardSeen | Reads/dismisses the welcome card state |
| useFeedInfiniteScroll.js | IntersectionObserver pattern | Triggers fetchPosts on scroll-to-bottom |
| useFeedConfirmToast.js | Internal state only | Confirm modal + toast orchestration |
| useDebugPrivacyRows.js | getDebugPrivacyRowsController | Dev-only debug panel hook |
| useFeed.utils.js | Browser Image API | Image preload + timeout utilities |

---

## Engine Dependencies

| Engine | Import Path | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| hydration | @hydration (alias) | Actor summary hydration — `hydrateActorsByIds`, `hydrateAndReturnSummaries` |

The hydration engine is used in three locations: `fetchFeedPage.pipeline.js` (mention actor enrichment), `useFeed.js` (background actor hydration), and `useCentralFeed.js` (background actor hydration). Also present in `feed.posts.dal.js` (legacy/diagnostic — layer violation, not in active pipeline).

---

## Cross-Feature Dependencies

| Feature | What Is Imported | Direction | Import Path |
|---|---|---|---|
| identity | useIdentity hook | feed consumes identity | @/features/identity/adapters/identity.adapter |
| post | PostCard, PostActionsMenu, ShareModal | feed renders post cards | @/features/post/adapters/... |
| moderation | ReportModal, ReportedPostCover, useHidePostForActor, useReportFlow | feed handles reporting | @/features/moderation/adapters/... |
| block | useBlockActorAction | feed block actions | @/features/block/adapters/hooks/useBlockActorAction.adapter |
| social | useFollowActorToggle, useFollowStatus | feed follow toggle | @/features/social/adapters/friend/subscribe/hooks/... |

All cross-feature imports in `CentralFeedScreen.jsx` and `useCentralFeedActions.js` go through adapter boundaries — compliant with the VCSM adapter boundary rule.

---

## Authorization Pattern

The feed feature uses a passive authorization model: there are no ownership assertion primitives or hard auth gates in controllers. Instead:

1. **Input guards** — controllers throw or return null if `actorId` / `viewerActorId` is missing.
2. **RLS-delegated trust** — post reads, reaction reads, hidden post reads, and block reads all delegate ownership enforcement to Supabase Row Level Security on the respective tables. Three of these RLS policies are unconfirmed (V1, V2, V3 OPEN — requires CARNAGE).
3. **Write path** — `feedWelcomeCard.controller.js` accepts a client-supplied `actorId` with no explicit `actor_owners` check. Safety depends entirely on `vc.actor_onboarding_steps` WITH CHECK RLS (V3 HIGH — CARNAGE required).
4. **Dev-only surfaces** — `getDebugPrivacyRows.controller.js` and the two Debug screen panels are ungated in the app; they should be guarded by `import.meta.env.DEV` at the invocation point.

---

## Module Independence Classification

**MOSTLY INDEPENDENT**

Reason: The feed feature owns its full stack (controllers, DALs, model, pipeline, hooks, screens) and has no engine-layer dependency beyond the `@hydration` alias for background actor enrichment. Cross-feature imports in `useCentralFeedActions.js` and `CentralFeedScreen.jsx` all cross via adapter boundaries. The one structural coupling concern is the SSOT controller `listActorPosts.controller.js`, which is shared by both feed and profiles — this is intentional and documented, not a boundary violation.

---

## Architecture State

**EVOLVING**

Two parallel hook implementations exist (`useFeed.js` and `useCentralFeed.js`) that expose identical APIs but use different state management strategies (manual cursor vs. React Query infinite scroll). The pipeline layer (`fetchFeedPage.pipeline.js`) and query abstraction (`fetchCentralFeedPage.js`) both exist as a result of this migration-in-progress. The legacy `feed.posts.dal.js` remains present with a `@hydration` engine import (layer violation). Until `useFeed.js` is retired and `feed.posts.dal.js` is removed, the feature carries dual-implementation technical debt.

---

## Known Structural Risks

1. **SA2 HIGH — DAL layer violation (partially mitigated):** `feed.posts.dal.js` (legacy/diagnostic) still imports `@hydration`. The active pipeline (`fetchFeedPage.pipeline.js`) correctly moves the hydration call to pipeline level. However the legacy DAL file has not been removed. Risk: accidental re-use or expansion.

2. **V3 HIGH — Unconfirmed WITH CHECK RLS on write path:** `feedWelcomeCard.controller.js` + `markWelcomeFeedCardSeenDAL` accept a client-supplied `actorId` for an upsert into `vc.actor_onboarding_steps`. No WITH CHECK RLS has been confirmed. Any authenticated user could potentially write a welcome-card-seen record for another actor's ID. Requires CARNAGE.

3. **V1/V2 MODERATE — Client-supplied actorIds in read DALs:** `readHiddenPostsForViewer` and `readViewerReactionsBatch` accept client-supplied actor IDs. Safety depends on RLS policies on `moderation.actions` and `vc.post_reactions` respectively. Unconfirmed. Requires CARNAGE.

4. **Dual hook implementation:** `useFeed.js` and `useCentralFeed.js` provide identical APIs. The feature is in an undeclared migration state. No deprecation marker on `useFeed.js`. `CentralFeedScreen.jsx` imports `useCentralFeed` — confirming the React Query path is preferred — but `useFeed` remains active and may still be consumed by other callers.

5. **SA3 MODERATE — FeedConfirmModal.jsx iOS stacking context:** Located in `components/` but has potential iOS stacking context issues. FALCON-flagged for investigation.

6. **console.log in pipeline (LK1):** `fetchFeedPage.pipeline.js` line 137 has an ungated `console.log` call inside a `debugPostId` path. Should be wrapped in `import.meta.env.DEV` guard.

7. **SA4 MODERATE — CentralFeedScreen split deferred:** `CentralFeedScreen.jsx` serves as both a Final Screen and a View Screen; SENTRY recommended splitting.

---

## Recommended Handoffs

- **CARNAGE** — Verify RLS on `vc.actor_onboarding_steps`, `moderation.actions`, `vc.post_reactions` to close V1/V2/V3. Required before THOR.
- **IRONMAN** — Finalize ownership matrix and create canonical OWNERSHIP.md. Assign SA2 refactor (remove `feed.posts.dal.js` or strip engine import).
- **SPIDER-MAN** — Zero test coverage; regression surface for pipeline, model normalization, and visibility logic is completely uncovered.
- **WOLVERINE** — Retire `useFeed.js` once `useCentralFeed.js` migration is confirmed complete; remove `feed.posts.dal.js`.

---

## Final Module Status

**MOSTLY COMPLETE**

The feature has a full layer stack, well-named files, explicit column selects, TTL-caching in hot DALs, and a well-structured pipeline. Incompleteness comes from: 3 unconfirmed RLS policies (security), 0 test files, a dual-hook migration left undeclared, one legacy DAL with a layer violation, and missing canonical governance files (OWNERSHIP.md, TESTS.md, BLOCKERS.md, DEFERRED.md).
